backend/main.mo: Motoko canister defining content sections, quiz questions, printable guides, and query methods for retrieving and filtering them.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting files and components related to adding delete functionality in the saved scans gallery.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Collection of short summaries describing the purpose of each frontend file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles and OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML file mounting the app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component setting up React Query and rendering header, content, and footer.
frontend/src/components/EducationalConte: Tabbed interface rendering scanner, educational sections, quiz, and guides with pest selection UI.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer with attribution, copyright, and disclaimer.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header with pest ID branding and icon.
frontend/src/components/pests/MiceConten: Provides detailed static content explaining mouse identification, signs of infestation, habitats, and risks.
frontend/src/components/pests/ScorpionsC: Provides static educational content about scorpion identification, species, signs, habitats, and behavior.
frontend/src/components/PhotoScanner.tsx: Photo scanner allowing camera capture, file upload, editing, saving scans, and managing a gallery.
Displays downloadable PDF guides for a quiz section, handling loading states and file downloads.
frontend/src/components/Quiz.tsx: Renders a multi‑step quiz with answer selection, feedback, scoring, and completion handling for a given section.
frontend/src/components/SavedScansGaller: Shows a gallery of saved scans with preview, date formatting, reordering, and deletion confirmation.
frontend/src/components/sections/Habitat: Displays information on bed bug hiding spots, feeding behavior, and lifecycle using images and descriptive text.
frontend/src/components/sections/Identif: Renders a section explaining how to identify bed bugs with images, descriptions of adults, life stages, and bite marks.
frontend/src/components/sections/Prevent: Displays prevention guidance with cards covering travel precautions and used furniture inspection, including supporting images.
frontend/src/components/sections/Treatme: Provides heat‑based treatment guidance with alerts, basics of heat treatment, and dryer instructions illustrated with images.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages the backend actor based on Internet Identity, auto‑refreshing queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageEditor.ts: Hook for client‑side image editing including rotation, zoom, enhancement, exporting, and state management for processed images.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity auth context, handling initialization, login, logout, stored identities, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching quiz questions, calculating results, and retrieving printable guides through the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSavedScans.ts: React hook managing saved scans in localStorage with load, save, delete, reorder, and lookup functions.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining light/dark mode color variables and applying global background, text, and border styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity context before rendering the main App component.
frontend/src/utils/imageProcessing.ts: Canvas-based utilities for rotating, enhancing, zooming, and cropping images, returning updated Data URLs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending colors, radii, animations, and plugins using custom OKLCH theme variables.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the app's current features, versions, and high-level goals.
